content: That's a clever play on words. The phrase "said more than you have done" is an idiom that means to talk more about something than actually accomplish it. In that case, yes, you would have said more than you have done if you've been talking a lot without taking action.
raw_content: That's a clever play on words. The phrase "said more than you have done" is an idiom that means to talk more about something than actually accomplish it. In that case, yes, you would have said more than you have done if you've been talking a lot without taking action.
